title: goodenia convexa
intro: Goodenia convexa, also known as the round-leaf goodenia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used by indigenous communities for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. The leaves and stems of the Goodenia convexa plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, which have been traditionally used by Aboriginal Australians for their medicinal and health benefits.
